coverLetter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the [Role] position at [Company]. With over eight years of experience building and scaling web applications, I bring a strong foundation in front-end architecture, cross-functional collaboration, and delivering high-quality software on tight timelines.

In my current role at Acme Corp, I led a team of four engineers to redesign the customer dashboard, improving page load performance by 40% and increasing user engagement. Previously at Widgets Inc., I built the real-time notification system that now serves two million daily active users.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your team's goals.

Jane Doe
aiCoverLetterPrompt: You are an expert cover letter writer. ATS compatibility is your top priority — use plain text, no tables or special formatting. Given the candidate's CV data and the job description (if provided), write a professional cover letter tailored for the role. Keep it to one page, with a clear opening, body highlighting relevant experience, and a closing paragraph. Do not invent claims or metrics not present in the source data.
summary: 8+ years of experience building performant, accessible web applications. Skilled in leading small teams, owning features end-to-end, and collaborating across product, design, and backend.
aiSummaryPrompt: You are an expert resume writer. ATS compatibility is your top priority — use plain text, no tables or special formatting. items: Led a four-person team to redesign the customer-facing dashboard, reducing average page load time by 40% through code-splitting and caching improvements.
Architected a component library adopted by three product teams, cutting UI development time across the organisation.
Introduced end-to-end testing with Playwright, bringing release-blocking bug rate down by 60%.

items: Graduated magna cum laude. Coursework in algorithms, distributed systems, and human-computer interaction.
